title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Netmeds Holdings Services family as a Senior Software Engineer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
